invariants: A manifest entry is a DEFAULT selection, NEVER a VERIFIED claim
Explicit CLI flag overrides manifest defaults; absent manifest entry is a hard error on decision paths.
Cadence defaults are per-stage entries named <stage>.<cadence_knob> and are resolved from this manifest before CLI overrides.
Protected Outdoor/Indoor labels are eval-only and are not read or written by this lane.

allow_auto_court_corners_preview.rationale: Server uploads seed preview corners for the confirm UI; CLI no-flag remains false.

ball.world_emission_fail_closed.selection: fail-closed 3D ball emission (world overlay + dense render trail)
ball.world_emission_fail_closed.notes: SHIP-FIRST ruling from runs/research_ball3d_20260709 (RULINGS adopt item 1) implementing the w7_ball3ddiag single fix: fallback/weak arc segments whose own fit statistics or spatial sanity say the solver ignored the 2D evidence contribute world_xyz=null and are dropped from the dense render trail; the confidence gate bands them hidden. Emission-policy honesty parity with pb.vision (they omit 3D on 31% of frames; we rendered fallback junk on 88-91%). Default selection, NOT a VERIFIED accuracy claim; VERIFIED=0 binding. Depth-ambiguity recovery of suppressed coverage = TT3D joint-anchor-search lane (adopt item 2), not this entry. Before/after measured on runs/lanes/w7_critique_20260709/wolv_world artifacts via re-composition.

ball.wasb_checkpoint.notes: Default unchanged: this remains the 0.7248 zero-shot anchor and is not a promotion of official retrains. Candidate evidence only: seed_official > control > stage1_official on the 1121-row owner corpus at runs/lanes/w6_labelingest_20260708/gpu_rescore/loso/loso_report.json.

ball.wasb_repo.notes: Threaded through the manifest; checkpoint value remains unchanged.

ball.arc_chain.selection: default auto-bounce plus arc-solved ball chain enabled
ball.arc_chain.notes: Default selection surface recorded; no ball metric threshold or gated metric key changed.

ball.detection_stride.notes: Owner ruling 2026-07-09 pins BALL full-rate: detection_stride=1 is explicit cadence doctrine, not an implicit default. BODY cadence may stride; BALL stays full-rate unless a future owner ruling changes this manifest entry and its runtime support.

input_quality.preflight.notes: Default is advisory: process continues with band_on_rejection=degraded_input. Strict mode is available via process_video and fail-closes before heavy stages. Owner policy binds courts not fully visible / camera angle too low to the first rejection reason.

stats.match_stats_v0.notes: Stats are a fail-open post-hoc consumer, never a pipeline blocker. The artifact remains BODY+COURT-only and excludes ball, paddle, rally, shot, contact, and speed claims.

mesh.coverage_mode.notes: Contact-density depends on events running before frame materialization in cold runs.

mesh.byte_budget_mib.notes: Manager ruling: the byte-budget-300 no-flag default STANDS as the owner W6 PLAYBACK RULING primary fix. Folded-in W6 close evidence includes outdoor budget-400 proof at 21.3fps/4.1x as upper-band playback evidence; this does not change the default value from 300 MiB.

mesh.human_review_ghost_emission.selection: human-review mesh frames emitted as preview ghost/estimated mesh
mesh.human_review_ghost_emission.notes: Owner ghost-mesh ruling: selected human_review-tier frames are no longer hidden or solid; they emit optional trust_badge=preview and count against the same byte-budget policy as other mesh frames. This does not change the 300 MiB default and does not resolve the separate owner-product tier-eligibility raise beyond human_review ghost emission.

value.current_policy: human_review ghost emission wired; wider tier eligibility unchanged
value.candidate_policy: raise mesh tier eligibility after owner product ruling

mesh.tier_eligibility_raise.notes: Pending by ruling: human_review ghost emission is wired as mesh.human_review_ghost_emission, but any wider tier-eligibility raise and the 300-vs-400 cap question remain unchanged until owner product ruling per [W6 RULINGS] (d).

mesh.target_frame_budget.selection: fixed-frame mesh cap disabled by default
mesh.target_frame_budget.notes: The previous no-flag value was fixed 100 frames; explicit --target-mesh-frame-budget remains the fixed-frame override.

tracking.reid_model.selection: OSNet ReID checkpoint path for raw-pool global association
tracking.reid_model.notes: Checkpoint is present locally and loader-smoke-verified; checkpoint availability does not clear the separate fresh-clip tracking gate or promote the pending tracking candidate.

tracking.global_association_profile.selection: owner-directed margin-1.0m + OSNet production global association profile

gate.name: owner_directed_stack_selection_not_accuracy_promotion
gate.bar: Burlington/Wolverine frozen production-entry reproduction within 0.0001 IDF1/cov4 and exact zero switches; VERIFIED remains 0

tracking.global_association_profile.notes: OWNER RULING 2026-07-13 ('do the flip with better accuracy'): no-flag runs use margin 1.0m plus OSNet global association with otherwise frozen RawPoolAuthorityConfig defaults. This is an owner-directed stack selection, NOT an accuracy-gate promotion; TRK remains preview and VERIFIED=0. Per-clip internal-val profiles remain explicit eval-only choices.

tracking.eval_only_association_profiles.selection: declared non-default clip-keyed raw-pool association profiles

wolverine_mixed_0200_mid_steep_corner.condition: eval/internal-val only; historical identity-bbox raw-pool probe

tracking.eval_only_association_profiles.notes: Dormant by ruling: manager wave-7 A2 repair declares these clip-keyed profiles as eval/internal-val choices only; no-flag production association resolves tracking.global_association_profile for every clip. Explicit --global-association-profile remains the mechanism to select them.

confidence.calibration_curves.notes: Fail-loud manifest-owned pointer; old artifacts remain backward-compatible because summaries are additive.

body.detector_fov.selection: track-box BODY dispatch with detector/FOV disabled
body.detector_fov.notes: Unifies local BodyStageRunner and RemoteConfig empty-string semantics. If fov_name is enabled later, models/MANIFEST.json id=moge_2_vitl_normal must resolve and verify.

body.fast_sam_3d_body_production.notes: Active BODY stack is SAM-3D-Body; Fast-SAM-3D-Body challenger NOT-ADOPT is recorded separately as DORMANT.

camera_motion.policy.notes: Zero behavior change: enable_camera_motion dataclass default is false, but no-flag runs the AUTO probe unless --disable-camera-motion is set.

placement.undistort.notes: Recorded default selection surface; no gated metric key or threshold changed.

body.schedule.notes: Default E2E route is serial. Overlap remains explicit and is not promoted by this lane.

body.skeleton_stride.notes: Owner ruling 2026-07-09: app capture is 60fps, BODY default is stride-2 for a 30Hz effective base skeleton cadence; event/contact-dense mesh boosts are additive and do not replace the base cadence. This is a pre-authorized default flip, not BODY accuracy promotion.

value.summary_policy: pipeline summaries record resolved cadence, effective_stride, and scheduled-vs-total counts where a stage skips compute

cadence.future_stage_pattern.notes: Documented pattern only: future stage cadence knobs must be added as manifest entries, resolved into process_video options, given explicit CLI overrides, and surfaced in stage metrics before changing runtime cadence.

paddle.fused_estimator.notes: Default selection only: wires the render-only estimated fused paddle stage into process_video.py. This is not VERIFIED, not canonical racket_pose.json, and not an RKT promotion.

paddle.reflection_cone_factor.selection: ball-reflection cone factor inside fused paddle estimator remains dormant

gate.bar: racket_physics_estimate estimates populated from real ball_track_arc_solved contact velocities; reflection contacts available > 0

paddle.reflection_cone_factor.notes: Dormant by ruling: reflection_channel_dormant_no_usable_ball_contacts until P1-4 real 3D ball velocities exist; do not wire or fake.

This is a default selection, not an accuracy promotion; VERIFIED=0 remains binding. The experimental key name is retained for API compatibility.

tracking.association_court_margin.notes: PROMOTED TO WIRED_DEFAULT per OWNER RULING 2026-07-13 ('do the flip with better accuracy'). This is a production-stack selection, NOT an accuracy-gate promotion: margin_1.0 reproduced the sweep through process_video, but cov4 remains 0.7117-0.7600 versus the 0.95 full bar. Margin 0.5m stays documented as the fallback candidate; margin 2.0m remains REJECTED (new switch + 24 far-off-court FP frames). OSNet license is owner-approved for internal/private use; commercial launch re-reviews at NS-07.3. TRK stays preview; VERIFIED=0.
